text.title: API Error Handling Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from raw input to validated api-error-handling artefact.

step.name: inventory-errors
step.action: Sample production traffic; collect distinct error shapes + status codes.

step.name: design-catalogue
step.action: Assign stable type URI per error class; pick title + class (client/server); pick representative detail_example.

step.name: wire-envelope
step.action: Implement RFC 7807 middleware that wraps every error response; inject traceId from active span.

step.name: split-classification
step.action: Map each exception class to a 4xx or 5xx status; align with 4xx-vs-5xx-split rule.

step.name: sanitise-and-ship
step.action: Strip PII / stack traces / secrets from error bodies; emit catalogue artefact; cross-link to api-documentation.
